---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=5mm        
      - left=5mm
      - right=5mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=35mm 
      - headsep=5mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \usepackage{multicol}
          \usepackage{ifthen}

          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \newcounter{score}
          
          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{Design of Columns}
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 30/02/2077} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---
```{python}
%precision 2
import math
# Define section choice
section = '356 x 406x 551'
lx_list = [3000, 6000, 88250, 7500]
Type_list = ['Corner', 'Edge', 'Internal,']
ixl = 0
ixr = 0
it = 0 
floor = 1

# Start of desing
Type = Type_list[it]
lxl = lx_list[ixl]
lxr = lx_list[ixr]
ly = 13500  
H = 6000

# dead floor
gt_f = 0.7
gs_f = 3.38
gc_f = 0.5
gste_f = 0.3
gser_f = 1.4
# impose floor
qpar_f = 1.0
qimp_f = 4.0
qclad = 1.2
# dead roof
gt_r = 1.0
gs_r = 3.38
gc_r = 0.5
gste_r = 0.2
gser_r = 1.0
#impose roof
qimp_r = 1.5

# Define ULS floor load
Gtyp_f = gt_f + gs_f + gc_f + gste_f + gser_f
Qtyp_f = qpar_f + qimp_f
wtyp_f = 1.35*Gtyp_f + 1.5*Qtyp_f

# Define ULS roof load
Gtyp_r = gt_r + gs_r + gc_r + gste_r + gser_r
Qtyp_r = qimp_r
wtyp_r = 1.35*Gtyp_r + 1.5*Qtyp_r

if Type == 'Corner':
  score = 1
else:
  score =0
```

\Large 
\linespread{1.4}
\selectfont 

# 
#
#
#
#
#

# Floor Loads
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[]$G_{tiles}$ = `{python} gt_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{steel}$ = `{python} gste_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{cladding}$ = `{python} gc_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{slab}$ = `{python} gs_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{services}$ = `{python} gser_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{partitions}$ = `{python} qpar_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} qimp_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{cladding}$ = `{python} qclad` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

# Roof Loads
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[]$G_{tiles}$ = `{python} gt_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{steel}$ = `{python} gste_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{cladding}$ = `{python} gc_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{slab}$ = `{python} gs_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{services}$ = `{python} gser_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} qimp_r` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
# ULS floor uniform area load
\begin{description}
    \item[]Typical dead load, $G_{typ}$ = $G_{tiles} + G_{steel} + G_{cladding} + G_{slab} + G_{services}$ = `{python} Gtyp_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]Typical imposed load, $Q_{typ}$ = $Q_{partitions} + Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} Qtyp_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]Typical load, $W_{typ}$ = $1.35\cdot G_{typ} + 1.5 \cdot Q_{typ}$ = `{python} wtyp_f` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}

# ULS roof uniform area load
\begin{description}
    \item[]Typical dead load, $G_{typ}$ = $G_{tiles} + G_{steel} + G_{cladding} + G_{slab} + G_{services}$ = `{python} Gtyp_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]Typical imposed load, $Q_{typ}$ = $Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} Qtyp_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]Typical load, $W_{typ}$ = $1.35\cdot G_{typ} + 1.5 \cdot Q_{typ}$ = `{python} wtyp_r` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}

# Description of column geometry
\setcounter{score}{`{python} int(score)`}
\ifthenelse{\value{score}=1}{
\begin{description}
    \item[]Column height, $H$ = `{python} H` $mm$
    \item[]Horizontal to the nearest left column $L_{x, left}$ = `{python} lxl` $mm$
    \item[]Horizontal to the nearest right column $L_{x, right}$ = `{python} lxr` $mm$
    \item[]Vertical spacing between columns $L_{y}$ = `{python} ly` $mm$
\end{description}}{
\begin{description}
    \item[]Column height, $H$ = `{python} H` $mm$
    \item[]Horizontal spacing between columns $L_{x, left}$ = `{python} lxr` $mm$
    \item[]Vertical spacing between columns $L_{y}$ = `{python} ly` $mm$
\end{description}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import math

df_all = pd.read_csv('section_mm.csv')
if df_all.columns[0] == 'Unnamed: 0':
  df_all = df_all.rename(columns = {'Unnamed: 0' : 'Section Profile'})

# Scientific notation formatter
def sci(value):
    exp_num = math.floor(math.log10(abs(value)))
    base = value / (10 ** exp_num)
    return value, base, exp_num

#material
fu= 500.0
fy = 355.0
E = 210000
G = 81000

df = df_all[df_all['Section Profile'] == section]
#section
h = float(df['h (mm)'].iloc[0])
b = float(df['b (mm)'].iloc[0])
tw = float(df['tw (mm)'].iloc[0])
tf = float(df['tf (mm)'].iloc[0])
d = float(df['d (mm)'].iloc[0])
r= float(df['r(mm)'].iloc[0])
A, A1, A2 = sci(float(df['A (mm^2)'].iloc[0]))
Iy, Iy1, Iy2 = sci(float(df['Iy (mm^4)'].iloc[0]))
Iz, Iz1, Iz2 = sci(float(df['Iz (mm^4)'].iloc[0]))
Ry = float(df['Ry (mm)'].iloc[0])
Rz = float(df['Rz (mm)'].iloc[0])
Wey, Wey1, Wey2 = sci(float(df['W_el,y (mm^3)'].iloc[0]))
Wez, Wez1, Wez2 = sci(float(df['W_el,z (mm^3)'].iloc[0]))
Wpy, Wpy1, Wpy2 = sci(float(df['W_pl,y (mm3)'].iloc[0]))
Wpz, Wpz1, Wpz2 = sci(float(df['W_pl,z (mm^3)'].iloc[0]))
Iw, Iw1, Iw2 = sci(float(df['I_w (mm^6)'].iloc[0]))
It, It1, It2 = sci(float(df['I_T (mm^4)'].iloc[0]))

ratio = h/b
if ratio > 1.2:
  if tf <= 40:
    ay = 0.21
    az = 0.34
  else:
    ay = 0.34
    az = 0.49
else:
  if tf <= 100:
    ay = 0.34
    az = 0.49
  else:
    ay = 0.70
    az = 0.70
```

#
# Material Properties
\begin{description}
  \item[]Ultimate strength: $f_{u}$ = `{python} fu` $N\cdot mm^{-2}$  
  \item[]Yield strength: $f_{y}$ = `{python} fy` $N \cdot mm^{-2}$  
  \item[]Young modulus: E = `{python} E` $N\cdot mm^{-2}$  
  \item[]Shear modulus: G = `{python} G` $N\cdot mm^{-2}$
\end{description}

# Section Properties of `{python} section`
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
  \item[] Overall depth, $h$ = `{python} h` mm  
  \item[] Width of section, $b$ = `{python} b` mm  
  \item[] Web thickness, $t_{w}$ = `{python} tw` mm  
  \item[] Flange thickness, $t_{f}$ = `{python} tf` mm  
  \item[] Depth between fillet, $h_{w}$ = `{python} d` mm  
  \item[] Root radius, $r$ = `{python} r` mm  
  \item[] Area of section, $A$ = `{python} A1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} A2`}$ $mm^{2}$ 
  \item[] 2nd moment Y-Y, $I_{y}$ = `{python} Iy1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Iy2`}$ $mm^{4}$  
  \item[] 2nd moment Z-Z, $I_{z}$ = `{python} Iz1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Iz2`}$ $mm^{4}$  
  \item[] Radius of gyration Y-Y, $i_{y}$ = `{python} Ry` mm  
  \item[] Radius of gyration Z-Z, $i_{z}$ = `{python} Rz` mm  
  \item[] Elastic modulus Y-Y, $W_{el,y}$ = `{python} Wey1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Wey2`}$ $mm^{3}$  
  \item[] Elastic modulus Z-Z, $W_{el,z}$ = `{python} Wez1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Wez2`}$ $mm^{3}$  
  \item[] Plastic modulus Y-Y, $W_{pl,y}$ = `{python} Wpy1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Wpy2`}$ $mm^{3}$  
  \item[] Plastic modulus Z-Z, $W_{pl,z}$ = `{python} Wpz1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Wpz2`}$ $mm^{3}$  
  \item[] Warping constant, $I_{w}$ = `{python} Iw1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} Iw2`}$ $mm^{6}$  
  \item[] Torsional constant, $I_{t}$ = `{python} It1` $\cdot 10^{`{python} It2`}$   $mm^{4}$  
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{python}
# Count number of floors above the column
num_force = [2, 3, 4 ,5]
num_floor = 9 - floor
if num_floor == 8:
    nfloor =7.5
else: 
    nfloor = num_floor
# eccentricity
ecc_y = (100 + h/2)
ecc_z = (100 + tw/2)
# Axial load and moment on column
vedlf, vedlr = 0.25*wtyp_f*lxl*ly*1e-6, 0.25*wtyp_r*lxl*ly*1e-6
vedrf, vedrr = 0.25*wtyp_f*lxr*ly*1e-6, 0.25*wtyp_r*lxr*ly*1e-6
vedvf, vedvr = 0.25*wtyp_f*(lxl/2 + lxr/2)*ly*1e-6, 0.25*wtyp_r*(lxl/2 + lxr/2)*ly*1e-6
vedef, veder = 0.125*wtyp_f*lxl*ly*1e-6, 0.125*wtyp_r*lxl*ly*1e-6
if Type == 'Corner':
  BC =2 
  Ned = nfloor*vedrf + vedrr + nfloor*veder + veder
  Myed = vedlf*ecc_y*1e-3
  Mzed = veder*ecc_z*1e-3
elif Type == 'Edge':
  BC = 3
  Ned = nfloor*vedlf + vedlr + nfloor*vedrf + vedrr + nfloor*vedvf + vedvr
  Myed = (vedlf - vedrf)*ecc_y*1e-3
  Mzed = vedvf*ecc_z*1e-13
else:
  BC = 4
  Ned = nfloor*vedlf + vedlr + nfloor*vedrf + vedrr + nfloor*vedvf + vedvr
  Myed = (vedlf - vedrf)*ecc_y*1e-3
  Mzed = (vedvf - vedvf)*ecc_z*1e-3
```

#
# Design axial load and moment on column
\begin{description}
  \item[]Number of floors above column = `{python} num_floor`
  \item[]Eccentricity about y-axis, $e_{y}$ = $100 +\frac{h}{2}$ = `{python} ecc_y` mm
  \item[]Eccentricity about z-axis, $e_{z}$ = $100 +\frac{tw}{2}$ = `{python} ecc_z` mm
\end{description}
\setcounter{score}{`{python} int(BC)`}
\ifthenelse{\value{score}=2}{
\begin{description}
    \item[]Reaction forces for Edge beams, 
    \item[]Reaction from secondary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,f}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot L_x\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedrf` kN
    \item[]Reaction from secondary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,r}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot L_x\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedrr` kN
    \item[]Reaction from primary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,vf} = \frac{1}{8} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot L_x \cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedvf` kN 
    \item[]Reaction from primary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,vr} = \frac{1}{8} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot L_x \cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedvr` kN
    \item[]Design axial load, $N_{ed}$ = $`{python} nfloor`\cdot (V_{ed,f} + V_{ed,vf})+ V_{ed,r} + V_{ed,vr}$ = `{python} Ned` kN
    \item[]Design Moment about y-axis, $M_{y}$ = $V_{ed,f} \cdot e_{y}$ = `{python} Myed` kNm
    \item[]Design Moment about z-axis, $M_{z}$ = $V_{ed,vf} \cdot e_{z}$ = `{python} Mzed` kNm
\end{description}}{
\ifhtennelse{\value{score}=3}{`
\begin{description}
    \item[]Reaction forces for Perimeter beams, 
    \item[]Left Reaction from secondary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,lf}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot L_{xl}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedlf` kN
    \item[]Left Reaction from secondary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,lr}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot L_{xl}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedlr` kN
    \item[]Right Reaction from secondary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,rf}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot L_{xr}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedrf` kN
    \item[]Right Reaction from secondary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,rr}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot L_{xr}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedrr` kN
    \item[]Reaction from primary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,vf} = \frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot (\frac{L_{xl}}{2} + \frac{L_{xr}}{2}) \cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedvf` kN 
    \item[]Reaction from primary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,vr} = \frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot (\frac{L_{xl}}{2} + \frac{L_{xr}}{2}) \cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedvr` kN
    \item[]Design axial load on column, $N_{ed}$ = $`{python} nfloor`\cdot (V_{ed,lf} + V_{ed,rf} + V_{ed,vf})+ V_{ed,lr} + V_{ed,rr} + V_{ed,vr}$ = `{python} Ned` kN
    \item[]Design Moment about y-axis, $M_{y}$ = $(V_{ed,lf}-V_{ed,rf}) \cdot e_{y}$ = `{python} Myed` kNm
    \item[]Design Moment about z-axis, $M_{z}$ = $V_{ed,vf} \cdot e_{z}$ = `{python} Mzed` kNm
end{description}}{
\begin{description}
    \item[]Reaction forces for Internal beams, 
    \item[]Left Reaction from secondary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,lf}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot L_{xl}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedlf` kN
    \item[]Left Reaction from secondary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,lr}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot L_{xl}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedlr` kN
    \item[]Right Reaction from secondary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,rf}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot L_{xr}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedrf` kN
    \item[]Right Reaction from secondary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,rr}$ = $\frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot L_{xr}\cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedrr` kN
    \item[]Reaction from primary beam due to floor load, $V_{ed,vf} = \frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,f}\cdot (\frac{L_{xl}}{2} + \frac{L_{xr}}{2}) \cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedvf` kN 
    \item[]Reaction from primary beam due to roof load, $V_{ed,vr} = \frac{1}{4} \cdot W_{typ,r}\cdot (\frac{L_{xl}}{2} + \frac{L_{xr}}{2}) \cdot L_y$ = `{python} vedvr` kN
    \item[]Design axial load on column, $N_{ed}$ = $`{python} nfloor`\cdot (V_{ed,lf} + V_{ed,rf} + V_{ed,vf})+ V_{ed,lr} + V_{ed,rr} + V_{ed,vr}$ = `{python} Ned` kN
    \item[]Design Moment about y-axis, $M_{y}$ = $(V_{ed,lf}-V_{ed,rf}) \cdot e_{y}$ = `{python} Myed` kNm
    \item[]Design Moment about z-axis, $M_{z}$ = $(V_{ed,vf} - V_{ed,vf}) \cdot e_{z}$ = `{python} Mzed` kNm
\end{description}}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{python}
ep = math.sqrt(235/fy)
crf = 9*ep
crw = 28*ep
cw = d
c1 = cw/tw
cf = (b-tw-2*r)/2
c2 = cf/tf
```
#
# Section Classification

According to EN 1993-1-1:2022 Eq 5.1, $\epsilon$ = $\sqrt{\frac{235}{f_{y}}}$ = `{python} ep` 

\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
  \item[]$c_{w}$ = $\frac{(b-t_{w}-2\cdot r)}{2}$ = `{python} cw`  
  \item[] $\frac{c_{w}}{t_{w}}$ = `{python} c1`
  \item[]Class 1 limit for web, 72 $\epsilon $ = `{python} crw`
  \item[]$c_{f}$ = $h_{w}$ = `{python} cf` 
  \item[]$\frac{c_{f}}{t_{f}}$ = `{python} c2`
  \item[]Class 1 limit for flange, 9 $\epsilon$ = `{python} crf`
\end{description}  
\end{multicols}

Since `{python} c1` < `{python} crw` and `{python} c2` < `{python} crf`, the section belongs to class 1  

```{python}
def buckle (Lcr, I, E, A, fy, a):
  Ncr = (math.pi**2 * E * I) / ((Lcr)**2)*1e-3
  lam = math.sqrt(( A*fy / (Ncr*1e3) ))
  phi = 0.5*(1 + a*(lam - 0.2) + lam**2)
  chi = min(1/(phi + math.sqrt(phi**2 - lam**2)),1)
  return Ncr, lam, phi, chi

Lcr = H
Ncry, lamy, phiy, chiy = buckle(Lcr, Iy, E, A, fy, ay)
Ncrz, lamz, phiz, chiz = buckle(Lcr, Iz, E, A, fy, az)

gamma1 = 1.0
chi = min([chiy,chiz])
Nrd = chi*A*fy*1e-3/gamma1
from IPython.display import Latex
if Nrd > Ned:
    output_axial = 'the section is safe in resisting axial load'
else:
    output_axial = 'the section is not safe in resisting axial load'
```

# Buckling resistance about y-y axis

\begin{description}
  \item[]$L_{cr,y}$ = `{python} Lcr` mm
  \item[]$N_{cr,y}$ = $\frac{\pi^{2}\cdot E\cdot I_{y}}{{L_{cr,y}}^{2}}$ = `{python} Ncry` kN
  \item[]$\lambda_{y}$ =  $\sqrt{\frac{N_{Rk}}{N_{cr,y}}}$ = $\sqrt{\frac{A\cdot f_{y}}{N_{cr,y}}}$ = `{python} lamy` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.69)
  \item[]$\frac{h}{b}$ = `{python} ratio` < 1.2
  \item[]$t_{f}$ = `{python} tf` mm < 100~mm
  \item[]Use buckling curve B,  $\alpha_{y}$ = `{python} ay` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Table 8.2)
  \item[]$\phi_{y}$ = $0.5 \cdot (1 + \alpha_{y} \cdot (\lambda_{y} - 0.2) + {\lambda_{y}}^{2})$ = `{python} phiy` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.74)
  \item[]$\chi_{y}$ = $\frac{1}{\phi_{y} + \sqrt{{\phi_{y}}^{2} - {\lambda_{y}}^{2}}}$ = `{python} chiy` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.73)
\end{description}

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
# Buckling resistance about z-z axis
\begin{description}
  \item[]$L_{cr,z}$ = `{python} Lcr` mm
  \item[]$N_{cr,z}$ = $\frac{\pi^{2}\cdot E\cdot I_{z}}{{L_{cr,z}}^{2}}$ = `{python} Ncrz` kN
  \item[]$\lambda_{z}$ = $\sqrt{\frac{N_{Rk}}{N_{cr,z}}}$ = $\sqrt{\frac{A\cdot f_{y}}{N_{cr,z}}}$ = `{python} lamz` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.69)
  \item[]$\frac{h}{b}$ = `{python} ratio` < 1.2
  \item[]$t_{f}$ = `{python} tf` mm < 100~mm
  \item[]Use buckling curve C,  $\alpha_{z}$ = `{python} az` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Table 8.2)
  \item[]$\phi_{z}$ = $0.5 \cdot (1 + \alpha_{z} \cdot (\lambda_{z} - 0.2) + {\lambda_{z}}^{2})$ = `{python} phiz` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.74)
  \item[]$\chi_{z}$ = $\frac{1}{\phi_{z} + \sqrt{{\phi_{z}}^{2} - {\lambda_{z}}^{2}}}$ = `{python} chiz` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.73)
  
\end{description}
  
# Axial load resistance
\begin{description}
  \item[]$\chi$ = min($\chi_{y},\chi_{z}$) = `{python} chi`
  \item[]$N_{RD}$ = $\chi\cdot A\cdot f_{y}$ = `{python} Nrd` kN --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.68)
  \item[]Maximum axial compressive force is `{python} Ned` kN.
  \item[]Therefore, `{python} output_axial`
\end{description}

```{python}
Mcr = ((math.pi**2 * E * Iz) / Lcr**2) * math.sqrt(Iw/Iz + (G * It * (Lcr)**2)/ (math.pi**2 * E * It))*1e-6
if ratio > 1.2:
    if tf <= 40:
        alt = min(0.12*math.sqrt(Wey/Wez), 0.34)
    else:
        alt = min(0.16*math.sqrt(Wey/Wez), 0.49)
else:
    alt = min(0.16*math.sqrt(Wey/Wez), 0.49)

phi_lt = 0.5*(1 + alt*(min(lamy,lamz) - 0.2) + min(lamy,lamz)**2)
chi_lt = min(1/(phi_lt + math.sqrt(phi_lt**2 - min(lamy,lamz)**2)),1)

Myrk = Wpy*fy*1e-6
Mzrk = Wpz*fy*1e-6
Mbrd = chi_lt*Myrk/gamma1
Mcrdz = Mzrk/gamma1

if Mbrd > Myed and Mcrdz > Mzed:
    output_moment = 'the section is safe in resisting bending'
else:
    output_moment = 'the section is not safe in resisting bending'

int_ratio = Ned/Nrd + Myed/Mbrd + Mzed/Mcrdz
if int_ratio < 1.0:
    output_interaction = 'the result is less than 1, the section is safe in resisting interaction'
else:
    output_interaction = 'the result is greater than 1, the section is not safe in resisting interaction'
```

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
# Lateral torsional buckling check
\begin{description}
    \item[]Critical moment, $M_{cr}$= $\frac{\pi^{2} \cdot E \cdot I_{z}}{L_{cr}^{2}} \cdot \left( \frac{I_{w}}{I_{z}} + \frac{G \cdot I_{t} \cdot L_{cr}^{2}}{\pi^{2} \cdot E \cdot I_{t}} \right)$ = `{python} Mcr` kNm
    \item[]For $\frac{h}{b}$ > 1.2 and $t_{f}$ <= 40 mm, 
    \item[]$\alpha_{LT}$ = min($0.12\cdot \sqrt{\frac{W_{el,y}}{W_{el,z}}}$, 0.34) = `{python} alt` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Table 8.5)
    \item[]$\phi_{LT}$ = $0.5\cdot(1 + \alpha_{LT}\cdot(\lambda_z - 0.2) + \lambda_z^{2})$ = `{python} phi_lt` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.82)
    \item[]$\chi_{LT}$ = $min(\frac{1}{\phi_{LT} + \sqrt{\phi_{LT}^{2} - \lambda_z^{2}}},1)$ = `{python} chi_lt` --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.81)
    \item[]Moment resistance (y-axis), $M_{brd}$ = $\frac{\chi_{LT} \cdot W_{pl,y} \cdot f_{y}}{\gamma_1}$ = `{python} Mbrd` kNm --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.79)
    \item[]Maximum moment about y-axis, $M_{yed}$ = `{python} Myed` kNm
    \item[]Moment resistance (z-axis), $M_{crd,z}$ = $\frac{W_{pl,z} \cdot f_{y}}{\gamma_1}$ = `{python} Mcrdz` kNm --- (EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.20)
    \item[]Maximum moment about z-axis, $M_{zed}$ = `{python} Mzed` kNm
    \item[]Therefore, `{python} output_moment`
\end{description}

# Axial and bending interaction check
\begin{description}
    \item[]Assume simple construction and refer to EN 1993-1-1 :2022, Eq 8.59 
    \item[]$\frac{N_{ed}}{N_{rk}} + \frac{M_{y}}{M_{brd}} + \frac{M_{z}}{M_{cr,dz}}$ = `{python} int_ratio`
    \item[]Therefore, `{python} output_interaction`
\end{description}
